Flag: Raban believes Oleg is behind school
Check the transcript for newly found Datachunks.
Good. This profile is now primed on Oleg Bakay. Now other Datachunks related to this person might appear.
Now, whenever you upload a Datachunk, Orwell will search for online documents with related content and add them to your bookmarks.
Try disabling Datachunks that seem illegitimate or unimportant to you in the Datachunk information window.
Your main task is to search online documents and extract relevant pieces of data, called "Datachunks".
Those Datachunks appear in a multitude of documents, but will always relate to our investigative target in some way. In our case that target is Bakay.
If you need to keep track of your objectives, click on the Orwell eye in the upper left corner of the screen or press ESC.
Orwell notifies me you just encountered a conflicted Datachunk. I have the feeling this will be a more frequent thing from now on.
If Orwell deems the contents of two Datachunks to be contradictory, it will notify you by flagging them as "conflicted."
You will have to make a choice:  which one of the conflicted Datachunks to upload, or to upload neither.
When uploading a conflicted Datachunk, the one you leave behind will be marked as invalid forever. So please, be vigilant!
I see you've found your first non-target person. Good. Orwell will keep track of them, but no Datachunks or new documents for them will appear.
Agent, you may have noticed by now that for every Datachunk you upload, ten minutes of time pass due to Orwell's extensive search algorithms.
